popularStory.headline: Hemenway life sketches from family files
popularStory.description: Ralph Hemenway was born about 1600 in England. He came to America in 1632 settling in Roxbury, Mass. In July 5, 1634 he married Elizabeth Hewes, born 1603 in England. Her parents were John Hewes and M …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hewes於1583年6月9日出生在英國艾可波金時，他的父親Roger Hewes30歲，母親Agnes30歲。他於1602年2月14日與Mary Foote在英國艾可沙爾福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1621年6月25日在英國賀特福爾羅伊斯頓享年38歲，埋葬在英國艾可沙爾福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hewes于1583年6月9日出生在英国艾可波金时，他的父亲Roger Hewes30岁，母亲Agnes30岁。他于1602年2月14日与Mary Foote在英国艾可沙爾福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1621年6月25日在英国賀特福爾羅伊斯頓享年38岁，埋葬在英国艾可沙爾福德。

variants.name: Hughes
meanings: English and Welsh: variant of Hugh with genitival or excrescent -s.
Irish and Scottish: adopted as an equivalent of Gaelic surnames based on the personal name Aodh ‘fire’, for example Ó hAodha, Mac Aodha; see McCoy and compare McHugh .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Hewes was born on 9 June 1583, in Bocking, Essex, England, his father, Roger Hewes, was 30 and his mother, Agnes, was 30. He married Mary Foote on 14 February 1602, in Shalford, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 25 June 1621, in Royston, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 38, and was buried in Shalford, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hewes est né le 9 juin 1583, à Bocking, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Roger Hewes, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Mary Foote le 14 février 1602, à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1621, à Royston, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Shalford, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hewes am 9. Juni 1583 in Bocking, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Hewes 30 und seine Mutter Agnes 30. Er hat am 14. Februar 1602 in Shalford, Essex, England Mary Foote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 25. Juni 1621 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Royston, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Shalford, Essex, England begraben.

Lui sposato Mary Foote il 14 febbraio 1602, nel Shalford, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Hewesが1583年6月9日にイギリスエセックスボクイングで生まれた時，父Roger Hewesは30歳，母Agnesは30歳であった。1602年2月14日にイギリスエセックスシャルフォードでMary Footeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1621年6月25日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアロイストンで38歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスシャルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hewes(이)가 1583년 6월 9일 영국 에세스 보킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Hewes(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1602년 2월 14일 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에서 Mary Foote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1621년 6월 25일 영국 허트퍼드실르 로이스턴에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 샤퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hewes nasceu em 9 de junho de 1583, em Bocking, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Hewes, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Foote em 14 de fevereiro de 1602, em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1621, em Royston, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Shalford, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Andrew by the Wardrobe with St: ст андрю би т вардроб вит ст анн блэккфрярс, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hewes родился 9 июня 1583 г. в местности боккинг, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Hewes было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Foote 14 февраля 1602 г. в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 25 июня 1621 г. в местности роистон, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности шэлфорд, эссекс, Англия.
